data.body: EPIC bbf1 (doctorial-semiironic-wrasse) CLOSED. All 6 children closed: 97f2(926), aff0(927), 625b(931), eefd(935), 21ca(936), ad44(945) — all merged to main, all LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1, all held-out TDD (RED-first, held-out oracle, mutation teeth). Reconciler core now fully backend-neutral (AC3/AC4): union neutrality gate green on main covering fetcher/applier/apply_handlers/_attestation/inbound_probe/outbound_differ/outbound_links/reconcile_check, single inbound_fields.py exemption (relocation tracked by follow-up 556a). LIVE VALIDATION: bridge-probe PASS; live reconcile pass PASS; link direction round-trip fidelity proven both ways; Reconcile Bridge GHA job healthy on merged code (37/37 mutations error=None). CLEANUP: Jira + rebar store clean (deleted 19 leftover test issues; store unchanged). Discovered+fixed pre-existing test bug (32cc, change 949 merged): test_link_sync_roundtrip_live had inverted blocks/depends_on direction expectation — differ was always correct. Closing 32cc pending replication.
